category_sources: Official GitHub README describes building vector tilesets from GeoJSON, FlatGeobuf, or CSV features.
source_facts.description says Tippecanoe builds vector tilesets from GeoJSON feature collections.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use Tippecanoe.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface; the repository also contains a man directory for command docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/felt/tippecanoe; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions vector tilesets and GeoJSON features.
